title: Discipline
subtitle: Track your rules and habits — process over P&L.

process.noScope: No trades or check-in yet — log the day to score it.
process.green: Clean day — no hard rules broken and habits on point.
process.yellow: Solid, but slipping: {completed}/{total} habits. No hard rules broken.
process.redSoft: Only {completed}/{total} habits — tighten the process tomorrow.
process.hardBroken: Hard rule broken ({count}). The day is red no matter what else went right.
process.noTrade: No trade today? If you stuck to your rules, that's still a win.

stats.noRulesYetTitle: Track your discipline, not just your P&L
stats.noRulesExplain: Define how you want to trade with two kinds of rules:
stats.noRulesExplain2: Your non-negotiables — the limits that keep you safe.
stats.noRulesExplain3: The routines that sharpen your execution.
stats.noRulesExplain4: Track them daily and watch your discipline build over time — whatever your P&L does.
stats.addStarterHint: 6 common rules to get going — edit or delete any of them later.
stats.perfSub: Average daily P&L & R-multiple, by discipline
stats.perfNoData: Log some trades on scored days to see this.
stats.perRuleSub: Compliance over active days · last 30 days

info.label: What is this?
info.currentStreak: How many clean days you're on right now.
info.bestStreak: Your longest clean streak in the year shown on the heatmap.
info.greenDays: Total clean days in the year shown on the heatmap.
info.discipline30: How well you've followed your rules over the last 30 days.
info.trend: Your daily discipline over the last 30 days.
info.perRule: How often you follow each rule.
info.weekday: Which days of the week you stay most disciplined.
info.perf: Compares your average daily P&L and R-multiple on disciplined vs warning/off-plan days. Only trading days that had a rule in effect are counted — days before you had rules (or outside a rule's schedule) are excluded. R is averaged only over days with a risk defined.

day.noActiveRules: No active rules. Add rules in the Rules tab.
day.noScheduledRules: No rules scheduled for this day.
day.hardToggleHint: Tap to flag a violation of this hard rule
day.checkInNoTradeHint: Scores this day by the rules you tick below — no trade needed.

dayReview.readOnly: You can't edit a day that hasn't happened yet.
dayReview.dailyNotePlaceholder: Reflection for the whole day — shared across all trades on this day…

calendar.info: Your whole year — one square per day, coloured by how disciplined it was.

rules.title: Your rules
rules.subtitle: Define the rules and habits you want to follow. Drag to reorder.
rules.namePlaceholder: e.g. No trading before the open

typeHint.hard: Non-negotiable. One violation makes the day red.
typeHint.soft: Quality habit. Adds to the day's score.

schedule.label: Schedule
schedule.minOneDay: A rule needs at least one day
schedule.customHint: Tap the days to build your own schedule
schedule.retroHint: Days outside the schedule won't count toward this rule — past days included.

rules.empty: No rules yet. Add your first rule to start tracking.
rules.hardEmpty: No hard rules yet. Add a non-negotiable rule.
rules.softEmpty: No soft habits yet. Add a quality habit.
rules.confirmDelete: Delete rule {name}? Its tracking history will be removed.
